ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ANNUAL WRITTEN STATUS REPORT, CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2019 - HEARING HELD. A BRIEF UPDATE IS GIVEN BY COURT-APPOINTED COUNSEL AND THE GUARDIAN. FOLLOWING THE UPDATES, THE COURT SET STATUS ON THE FILING OF A CHANGE OF ADDRESS FORM FOR THE GUARDIAN AND FOR THE MINOR. IN ADDITION, THE COURT ORDERED AN AMENDED ANNUAL WRITTEN STATUS REPORT (AWSR) WHICH IS TO INCLUDE THE MINOR'S REPORT CARD. THE CHANGE OF ADDRESS FORMS AND THE AMENDED AWSR ARE TO BE FILED BY 11/12/19. STATUS ON THOSE FILINGS IS SET FOR 11/19/19. THE NEXT AWSR DATE IS SET FOR JUNE 16, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M.. -
